name: paperclip-mcp
description: MCP server for the Paperclip AI agent orchestration platform. Manage issues, agents, goals, approvals, and costs via natural language.

PAPERCLIP_API_KEY.description: Agent API key — generate in Paperclip UI: Settings → API Keys → New Key.

PAPERCLIP_COMPANY_ID.description: Company UUID — visible in the Paperclip UI URL: /companies/{uuid}.

PAPERCLIP_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Paperclip API. Default: http://localhost:3100/api
